We’re moving to a web-first version of Dashlane. Our web app allows you to access and manage your data on the web securely.   So from now on, log in at app.dashlane.com or from the browser extension instead of your desktop app.

Unser Schwerpunkt liegt künftig auf unserer neuen weborientierten Version von Dashlane. Mit unserer Web-App können Sie sicher auf Ihre Daten im Internet zugreifen und diese in einer geschützten Umgebung verwalten.   Wir bitten Sie, sich in Zukunft nicht mehr über Ihre Desktop-App, sondern unter app.dashlane.com oder über die Browser-Erweiterung anzumelden.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane ist mehr als ein Passwort-Manager: Es ist die schnellste und einfachste Möglichkeit, im Internet unterwegs zu sein. Unsere Browser-Erweiterung lässt sich nahtlos mit Ihren Online-Gewohnheiten integrieren. Sie steht Ihnen jederzeit zur Seite, speichert Ihre Passwörter sowie Ihre privaten Daten und gibt diese für Sie ein.
Alle Passwörter, überall
– Passwörter und private Daten beim Browsen speichern – Unbegrenzt viele Passwörter speichern und überall darauf zugreifen – Dashlane-Daten automatisch mit allen Ihren Geräten synchronisieren, auch wenn Ihr Smartphone und Ihr Computer unterschiedliche Betriebssysteme nutzen – Mühelos sichere Passwörter generieren und speichern – mit einem Klick – Eindeutige, sichere Passwörter für alle Ihre Konten erstellen
Automatisch anmelden
– Jedes Mal automatisch den richtigen Benutzernamen und das richtige Passwort für jedes Konto eingeben – Adressen und andere Formulare mit nur einem Klick ausfüllen – Hören Sie auf, nach Kartennummern zu suchen, und machen Sie jeden Checkout zum Kinderspiel
Datenschutz hat oberste Priorität
– Dashlane schützt Ihre Passwörter mit den branchenweit sichersten patentierten Verschlüsselungsverfahren – Wählen Sie die gewünschte Datenspeicherungsmethode aus: nur lokal oder synchronisiert und mit Backup in der Cloud
Wir lassen Ihre Daten unberührt
– Wir finden, dass die Kontrolle über Ihre Daten bei Ihnen liegen sollte. Dashlane ist so konzipiert, dass die von Ihnen gespeicherten Daten für uns nicht sichtbar sind. • Andere Unternehmen speichern Ihre Daten nicht gut geschützt, weil das einfach nicht zu ihren Aufgaben gehört. Hier bei Dashlane stellt genau das unsere Hauptaufgabe dar. Weitere Informationen zu Dashlane finden Sie in unserer Datenschutzrichtlinie (https://www.dashlane.com/de/privacy) und in unseren Nutzungsbedingungen (https://www.dashlane.com/de/terms).

Omnix Enterprise provides Risk Detection, AI phishing protection, and in-browser security alerts for every employee—even if they don’t have a Dashlane account or are logged out. Start your trial today.

Omnix Enterprise biedt risicodetectie, AI-phishingbescherming en beveiligingswaarschuwingen in de browser voor elke medewerker, zelfs als ze geen Dashlane-account hebben of zijn uitgelogd. Start vandaag nog uw proefperiode.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.
これは、会社が管理するすべてのブラウザに展開できる Dashlane ブラウザ拡張機能です。Dashlane ブラウザ拡張機能は、従業員への表示プロンプトなしにサイレントで展開されます。従業員の操作を必要とせずにリスクを監視し、管理者が組織全体の認証情報リスクを正確に閲覧できるようにします。

We need permission to collect and store data such as your email address and the websites you visit. This is required to create your account and autofill forms. If you decline, the extension will be uninstalled.
You can also give us permission to collect usage data such as usage logs and exceptions. This allows us to track app performance, interactions, and errors. We use this to improve our product and provide better support. If you choose not to allow it, you will still be able to use the extension.
All usage data is anonymized to protect your privacy.

Necesitamos permiso para recopilar y guardar datos, como su dirección de correo electrónico y los sitios web que visita. Esto es necesario para crear su cuenta y autocompletar los formularios.
También puede darnos permiso para recopilar los datos de uso, lo que nos permite hacer un seguimiento del rendimiento, las interacciones y los errores de la aplicación. Los usamos para mejorar nuestro producto y ofrecer una mejor asistencia técnica.
Para proteger su privacidad, todos los datos de uso son anónimos.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be mass deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Dies ist die Dashlane-Browser-Erweiterung, die massenweise über alle unternehmenseigenen Browser bereitgestellt werden kann. Die Dashlane-Browser-Erweiterung wird unbemerkt bereitgestellt, ohne sichtbare Aufforderungen für Mitarbeitende. Sie überwacht Risiken, ohne dass eine Interaktion der Mitarbeitenden erforderlich ist, und gibt Administratoren so einen genauen Überblick über das Anmeldedatenrisiko der gesamten Organisation.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be mass deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.
이는 회사에서 관리하는 모든 브라우저에 대규모로 배포할 수 있는 Dashlane의 브라우저 확장 프로그램입니다. Dashlane browser extension은 직원에게 눈에 띄는 프롬프트 없이 조용히 배포됩니다. 직원의 개입 없이도 위험을 모니터링하여, 관리자가 조직 전체의 자격 증명 위험을 정확하게 파악할 수 있도록 합니다.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane är mer än en lösenordshanterare. Det är det snabbaste och lättaste sättet att använda internet. Vårt webbläsartillägg integreras sömlöst med dina onlinerutiner genom att följa med dig och spara och fylla i dina lösenord och personuppgifter medan du surfar.
Alla lösenord, överallt
- Spara lösenord och personuppgifter medan du surfar - Lagra ett obegränsat antal lösenord och kom åt dem var du än befinner dig - Synka dina Dashlane-data till alla dina enheter automatiskt, även om din telefon och dator drivs av olika system - Generera enkelt och spara starka lösenord på ett klick - Skapa unika, säkra lösenord för alla dina konton
Logga in automatiskt
- Fyll automatiskt i användarnamn och lösenord för alla konton, varje gång - Fyll i adresser och andra formulär på ett klick - Sluta leta efter kortnummer och gör varje utcheckning till en barnlek
Byggt med sekretess i åtanke
- Dashlane skyddar dina lösenord med branschens starkaste patenterade krypteringsmetoder - Välj vilken metod du vill använda för datalagring: endast lokalt eller synkat och säkerhetskopierat till molnet
Vi vill inte ha dina data
- Vi anser att du själv borde ha kontrollen över dina data. Dashlane är byggt så att vi inte kan se någon av den information som du lagrar där. • Andra företag lagrar inte dina data säkert eftersom det inte är deras jobb. På Dashlane är det däremot vårt jobb. Du hittar mer information om Dashlane i vår sekretesspolicy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) och i våra användarvillkor (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Your plan now includes AI-Powered Scam Protection, designed to keep your data secure.
Din plan inkluderar nu AI-drivet bedrägeriskydd, utformat för att hålla dina data säkra.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane 不仅仅是密码管理器：它是使用互联网的最快捷、最简便的方式。我们的浏览器扩展程序可无缝整合入您的日常网络活动，为您保存和填写密码和个人信息。
所有密码，随时随地可用
- 在您浏览时保存并填写您的密码和个人信息 - 存储无限量的密码，并随时随地进行访问 - 自动将您的 Dashlane 数据同步到每台设备，即使您的手机和计算机在不同的系统上运行 - 轻松一键生成并保存安全程度高的密码 - 为您的每个帐户创建独有的安全密码
自动登录
- 每次都在每个帐户上自动填充正确的用户名和密码 - 一键填充地址和其他表单 - 无需再寻找卡号，每次结账易如反掌
专为隐私而设计
- Dashlane 采用行业安全程度最高的专利加密方法保护您的密码 - 选择您的数据存储方式：仅存储在本地或同步并备份至云
我们不想要您的数据
- 我们相信您应该掌控自己的数据。Dashlane 的设计使我们无法看到您存储在其中的任何信息。 • 其他公司不会安全地存储您的数据，因为这不是他们的职责。在 Dashlane，这就是我们的职责所在。如需了解关于 Dashlane 的更多信息，请参阅我们的隐私政策 (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) 和服务条款 (https://www.dashlane.com/terms)。

We warn you if our AI model identifies a website as suspicious. This technology operates on our zero-knowledge principle, so Dashlane never sees your data. These alerts are only available on desktop.

This section contains data related to Dashlane’s AI Phishing Alerts feature. AI Phishing Alerts warn employees when they’re on a suspicious website before they enter any info, even if the employee is logged out of Dashlane or doesn’t have a Dashlane account.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane は、ただのパスワードマネージャーではありません。インターネットを最も速く簡単に使用する方法です。Dashlane のブラウザ拡張機能は、閲覧中にパスワードや個人情報を保存し、自動入力するため、日常的なオンライン作業にシームレスに統合されます。
すべてのパスワードを保管
- 閲覧中にパスワードや個人情報を保存 - パスワードを無制限に保存でき、いつでもアクセス可能 - スマホやパソコンが異なるシステム上で稼働していても Dashlane データをあらゆるデバイスに自動的に同期 - 強力なパスワードをワンクリックで簡単に生成して保存 - 各アカウントにユニークでセキュアなパスワードを作成
自動ログイン
- あらゆるアカウント上でユーザーネームとパスワードを毎回正しく自動入力 - 住所や他のフォームにワンクリックで自動入力 - カード番号を探す手間がなくなり、精算がスムーズに
プライバシーを守るための設計
- Dashlane は業界屈指の特許取得済み暗号化方式でパスワードを保護 - データ保管方式を次から選択：ローカルのみ、または同期してクラウドにバックアップ
個人データの収集なし
- 自分のデータは自分で管理できるべきだと当社は信じております。Dashlane はお客様が保管している情報を見ることができないように設計されています。 • 他の企業はデータを安全に保管しません。データの保護を生業としているわけではないからです。Dashlane に関する詳細については、弊社のプライバシーポリシー（https://www.dashlane.com/privacy）およびサービス利用規約（https://www.dashlane.com/terms）を参照してください。

This website was flagged by Dashlane's AI-powered phishing protection, and it may be trying to steal your data.

is information about what users do outside of the Services (e.g., sites where autofill is used to sign in; what sites or apps a user has credentials for in their Secured Data). Behavioral Data is critical to the Services’ proper operation – Apps must recognize the site a user is logging into to populate the credentials, for example. Certain Behavioral Data is available to authorized administrators of B2B Accounts (each, a “B2B Admin”) on an individual basis to enable Client Admins to improve Client security (e.g., B2B Admins can see whether an individual user has compromised credentials), but is only available to Dashlane on a fully anonymized basis (e.g. Dashlane can see what percentage of all users have credentials for a specific site, but not whether any individual user has credentials for that site).

sont des informations sur ce que les utilisateurs font en dehors des Services (par exemple, les sites où la remplissage automatique est utilisée pour se connecter ; les sites ou applications pour lesquels un utilisateur a des identifiants dans ses données sécurisées). Les données de comportement sont essentielles au bon fonctionnement des services - les applis doivent reconnaître le site sur lequel un utilisateur se connecte pour saisir les identifiants, par exemple. Certaines données comportementales sont disponibles pour les administrateurs autorisés des comptes B2B (chacun, un « administrateur B2B » ) sur une base individuelle pour permettre aux administrateurs clients d'améliorer la sécurité des clients (par exemple, les administrateurs B2B peuvent voir si un utilisateur individuel a des identifiants compromis), mais ne sont disponibles que pour Dashlane sur une base entièrement anonymisée (p. ex. Dashlane peut voir quel pourcentage de tous les utilisateurs ont des identifiants pour un site spécifique, mais pas si un utilisateur en particulier dispose d'identifiants pour ce site).

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane은 암호 관리자 이상의 기능을 제공합니다. 즉, 인터넷을 사용하는 가장 빠르고 쉬운 방법입니다. Dashlane의 브라우저 확장은 암호와 개인 정보를 저장하고 채울 때 온라인 루틴에 매끄럽게 통합됩니다.
어디서나 모든 암호를 공유해서 사용하세요
- 탐색할 때 암호와 개인 정보 저장 - 개수에 제한 없이 암호 저장 및 어디서나 액세스 - 휴대폰과 컴퓨터가 다른 시스템에서 실행될 때도 모든 기기로 Dashlane 데이터 자동 동기화 - 한 번의 클릭으로 쉽게 강력한 암호 생성 및 저장 - 각 계정에 대해 고유한 보안 암호 생성
자동 로그인
- 언제든 모든 계정에서 올바른 사용자 이름과 암호 자동 채우기 - 한 번의 클릭으로 주소와 기타 양식 채우기 - 카드 번호 검색 중지 및 모든 결제의 간편한 처리
개인 정보 보호를 고려한 특수 설계
- Dashlane은 특허를 받은 업계에서 가장 강력한 암호화 방법으로 암호를 보호합니다 - 로컬만 또는 클라우드로의 동기화 및 백업 중 데이터 보관 방법을 선택하십시오
Dashlane은 사용자 데이터를 원치 않습니다
- Dashlane은 사용자 데이터를 본인이 직접 통제해야 한다고 생각합니다. Dashlane은 사용자가 저장한 정보를 당사에서 볼 수 없도록 설계되었습니다. • 다른 기업들은 자신들의 업무가 아니기 때문에 데이터를 안전하게 저장하지 않습니다. Dashlane은 다릅니다. Dashlane에 대한 자세한 정보는 개인정보 보호정책(https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) 및 서비스 약관(https://www.dashlane.com/terms)을 참조하세요.

Autofill settings
Paramètres de remplissage automatique

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane is meer dan een wachtwoordbeheerder: het is de snelste en gemakkelijkste manier om op internet te surfen. Onze browserextensie integreert naadloos in wat u elke dag online doet, door alle wachtwoorden en persoonlijke gegevens die u gebruikt op te slaan en in te vullen.
Elk wachtwoord, overal
- Sla wachtwoorden en persoonlijke informatie op terwijl u op het internet surft - Sla een onbeperkt aantal wachtwoorden op die overal voor u toegankelijk zijn - Synchroniseer uw Dashlane-gegevens automatisch op elk apparaat, zelfs als uw telefoon en computer op verschillende systemen draaien - Genereer eenvoudig sterke wachtwoorden en sla ze in één klik op - Creëer unieke, veilige wachtwoorden voor al uw accounts
Log automatisch in
- Laat elke keer weer automatisch de juiste gebruikersnaam en het juiste wachtwoord invullen op elk account - Vul in één klik adressen en andere formulieren in - Zoek niet langer naar kaartnummers en maak van het afrekenen een eitje Speciaal gebouwd voor privacy
- Dashlane beschermt uw wachtwoorden met de sterkste gepatenteerde encryptiemethodes in de branche - Kies uw methode voor het opslaan van gegevens: alleen lokaal, of gesynchroniseerd en met een back-up in de cloud
Wij willen uw gegevens niet
- Wij geloven dat u de controle over uw gegevens moet hebben. Dashlane is zo ontworpen dat we niets van de informatie die u ermee opslaat kunnen zien. • Andere bedrijven slaan uw gegevens niet veilig op, omdat het niet hun taak is. Bij Dashlane is dat ons werk. Bekijk voor meer informatie over Dashlane ons privacybeleid: (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) en onze Dienstvoorwaarden ((https://www.dashlane.com/terms) voor meer informatie over Dashlane.
Protect every user with Dashlane's AI model, built on zero-knowledge principles.
借助基于零知识原则构建的 Dashlane AI 模型，保护每位用户。

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

A Dashlane é mais do que um gerenciador de senhas: é a maneira mais rápida e prática de usar a internet. Nossa extensão do navegador oferece uma integração perfeita com suas atividades online, permitindo salvar e preencher suas senhas e informações pessoais a qualquer momento.
Acesse todas as suas senhas em qualquer lugar
- Salve suas senhas e informações pessoais enquanto navega - Armazene senhas ilimitadas e acesse-as de qualquer lugar - Sincronize dados na Dashlane em todos seus dispositivos automaticamente, mesmo que o seu celular e o seu computador tenham sistemas operacionais diferentes - Gere e salve senhas fortes com um único clique - Crie senhas seguras e exclusivas para cada uma de suas contas
Faça login automaticamente
- Preencha automaticamente o nome de usuário e senha em todas as suas contas - Preencha endereços e outros campos de formulários com apenas um clique - Finalize suas compras rapidamente sem ter que procurar números de cartões de crédito
Criada especialmente para proteger sua privacidade
- A Dashlane usa os melhores métodos de criptografia patenteada do mercado para proteger suas senhas - Escolha a forma de armazenamento dos seus dados: somente local ou sincronizado e com backup na nuvem
Não queremos os seus dados
- Acreditamos que é você quem deve controlar seus próprios dados. A Dashlane foi criada de uma forma que impossibilita qualquer acesso às suas informações da nossa parte. • Outras empresas não armazenam seus dados com segurança porque, francamente, não é o foco delas. Na Dashlane, proteger suas informações é a nossa maior prioridade. Para mais informações sobre a Dashlane, veja nossa Política de Privacidade (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) e Termos de Serviço (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

is information about what users do outside of the Services (e.g., sites where autofill is used to sign in; what sites or apps a user has credentials for in their Secured Data). Behavioral Data is critical to the Services’ proper operation – Apps must recognize the site a user is logging into to populate the credentials, for example. Certain Behavioral Data is available to authorized administrators of B2B Accounts (each, a “B2B Admin”) on an individual basis to enable Client Admins to improve Client security (e.g., B2B Admins can see whether an individual user has compromised credentials), but is only available to Dashlane on a fully anonymized basis (e.g. Dashlane can see what percentage of all users have credentials for a specific site, but not whether any individual user has credentials for that site).

es información sobre lo que hacen los usuarios fuera de los Servicios (por ejemplo, sitios donde se usa el autocompletado para ingresar; para qué sitios o aplicaciones tiene credenciales un usuario en sus Datos protegidos). Los datos de comportamiento son fundamentales para el funcionamiento adecuado de los Servicios. Las aplicaciones deben reconocer el sitio en el que un usuario ingresa para rellenar las credenciales, por ejemplo. Ciertos datos de comportamiento están disponibles para los administradores autorizados de cuentas B2B (cada uno, un «administrador B2B») de forma individual para permitir a los administradores de clientes mejorar la seguridad del cliente (por ejemplo, los administradores de B2B pueden ver si un usuario individual ha comprometido credenciales), pero solo están disponibles para Dashlane de forma completamente anónima (por ejemplo, Dashlane puede ver qué porcentaje de todos los usuarios tienen credenciales para un sitio concreto, pero no si un usuario tiene credenciales para ese sitio).

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be mass deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Il s'agit de l'extension du navigateur Dashlane qui peut être déployée en masse sur tous les navigateurs gérés par l'entreprise. L'extension du navigateur Dashlane est déployée silencieusement, sans aucune invite visible pour les employés. Elle surveille les risques sans nécessiter d'interaction de la part des employés, offrant aux administrateurs une vue précise des risques liés aux identifiants de l'ensemble de l'organisation.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be mass deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Questa è l'estensione del browser Dashlane che può essere distribuita in massa su tutti i browser gestiti dall'azienda. L'estensione del browser Dashlane viene distribuita in modalità silenziosa, senza alcun messaggio visibile per i dipendenti. Monitora il rischio senza richiedere l'interazione dei dipendenti, fornendo agli amministratori una visione accurata del rischio relativo alle credenziali per l'intera organizzazione.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane es más que un administrador de contraseñas: es la forma más rápida y sencilla de usar Internet. Nuestra extensión de navegador se integra a la perfección en sus rutinas en línea, lo sigue, y guarda y llena contraseñas e información personal sobre la marcha.
Todas las contraseñas en todas partes
- Guarde contraseñas e información personal a medida que navega - Guarde una cantidad ilimitada de contraseñas y acceda a ellas desde cualquier lugar - Sincronice sus datos de Dashlane en todos los dispositivos automáticamente, incluso si su teléfono y su computadora tienen distintos sistemas operativos - Genere y guarde contraseñas seguras con un solo clic - Cree contraseñas seguras y exclusivas para cada una de sus cuentas
Ingrese automáticamente
- Llene automáticamente el nombre de usuario y la contraseña en todas las cuentas siempre - Llene direcciones y otros formularios con un solo clic - Ya no busque números de tarjetas de crédito, efectúe pagos en línea de manera muy sencilla
Diseñado específicamente para la privacidad
- Dashlane protege sus contraseñas con los métodos de encriptación patentados más seguros de la industria - Elija su método de almacenamiento de datos: solo local o sincronización y copia de respaldo en la nube
No queremos sus datos
- Creemos que usted debe controlar su información. Dashlane está diseñada para que no podamos ver la información que usted almacena. • Otras empresas no almacenan sus datos de manera segura porque no es su trabajo. En Dashlane, es lo que hacemos. Para obtener más información en Dashlane, consulte nuestra Política de privacidad (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) y los Términos de servicio (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Esta é a extensão do navegador da Dashlane que pode ser implantada em todos os navegadores gerenciados pela empresa. A extensão do navegador da Dashlane é implantada silenciosamente, sem nenhum aviso visível aos funcionários. Ela monitora riscos sem precisar de interação dos funcionários, fornecendo aos administradores uma visão precisa do risco de credenciais de toda a organização.

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

L'estensione del browser Dashlane viene distribuita in modalità silenziosa, senza alcun messaggio visibile per i dipendenti. Monitora il rischio senza richiedere l'interazione dei dipendenti, fornendo agli amministratori una visione accurata del rischio relativo alle credenziali per l'intera organizzazione.

組織全体の可視性を管理

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Dashlane è molto più di un gestore di password: è il modo più rapido e semplice di utilizzare Internet. La nostra estensione per browser si integra perfettamente nelle tue routine online seguendoti dappertutto per salvare e inserire le tue password e informazioni personali mentre navighi.
Tutte le password a portata di mano, ovunque
- Salva le password e i dati personali mentre navighi - Archivia un numero illimitato di password a cui puoi accedere ovunque - Sincronizza automaticamente i dati in Dashlane con qualsiasi dispositivo, anche se il telefono e il computer hanno sistemi operativi diversi - Crea password sicure e salvale con un clic - Crea password uniche e robuste per ciascun account
Accedi automaticamente
- Compila automaticamente nome utente e password per ogni account, sempre - Compila l'indirizzo e altri campi con un clic - Smetti di cercare numeri di carte di credito e non perdere tempo nei pagamenti
Pensato appositamente per la privacy
- Dashlane protegge le tue password con i metodi crittografici più avanzati del settore - Scegli il metodo di archiviazione che preferisci: solo in locale o con backup nel cloud
Non vogliamo i tuoi dati
- Riteniamo che sia tu a dover gestire i tuoi dati. Dashlane è stato progettato in modo da non vedere le informazioni che archivi. • Altre aziende non archiviano i tuoi dati in modo sicuro perché si occupano d'altro, mentre per noi è il nostro pane quotidiano. Per altre informazioni su Dashlane, leggi la nostra Informativa sul trattamento dei dati personali (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) e i Termini di servizio (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

This is the Dashlane browser extension that can be deployed across all company-managed browsers. The Dashlane browser extension is deployed silently, without any visible prompts to employees. It monitors for risk without needing employee interaction, giving admins an accurate view of the entire organization’s credential risk.

Det övervakar risker utan att behöva interaktion från anställda, vilket ger administratörer en korrekt bild av hela organisationens uppgiftsrisk.

This section contains data related to Dashlane’s AI Phishing Alerts feature. AI Phishing Alerts warn employees when they’re on a suspicious website before they enter any info, even if the employee is logged out of Dashlane or doesn’t have a Dashlane account.

Dashlane is more than a password manager: It’s the fastest and easiest way to use the internet. Our browser extension integrates seamlessly into your online routines by following along with you to save and fill in your passwords and personal information as you go.
Every password, everywhere
- Save passwords and personal info as you browse - Store an unlimited number of passwords and access them anywhere - Sync your Dashlane data to every device automatically, even if your phone and computer run on different systems - Easily generate and save strong passwords in one click - Create unique, secure passwords for each of your accounts
Log in automatically
- Autofill the right username and password on every account, every time - Fill addresses and other forms with a click - Stop searching for card numbers, and make every checkout a breeze
Purpose-built for privacy
- Dashlane protects your passwords with the industry's strongest patented encryption methods - Choose your method for data storage: local-only or synced and backed up to the cloud
We don’t want your data
- We believe you should control your data. Dashlane is designed so that we can't see any of the information you store in it. • Other companies don’t store your data safely because it’s not their job. At Dashlane, it’s what we do.For more information on Dashlane, see our Privacy Policy (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) and Terms of Service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

Bien plus qu'un gestionnaire de mots de passe, Dashlane est le meilleur outil pour gagner du temps et parcourir le Web plus facilement. Notre extension pour navigateur s'intègre parfaitement à votre quotidien en vous accompagnant pour enregistrer et saisir vos mots de passe et vos informations personnelles chaque fois que vous en avez besoin.
Tous vos mots de passe, sur tous vos sites et applications
- Enregistrez automatiquement vos mots de passe et informations personnelles lors de la navigation - Enregistrez un nombre illimité de mots de passe afin d'y accéder partout - Synchronisez automatiquement vos données Dashlane sur tous vos appareils, quel que soit leur système d'exploitation - Générez facilement des mots de passe forts en un seul clic - Créez des mots de passe uniques et sécurisés pour chacun de vos comptes
Connectez-vous automatiquement
- Saisissez automatiquement les bons identifiants sur tous vos sites Web, à chaque fois - Remplissez les adresses et autres formulaires en un clic - Ne perdez plus de temps à chercher votre numéro de carte et simplifiez vos achats
Conçue pour la confidentialité
- Dashlane protège vos mots de passe grâce à des méthodes de chiffrement de pointe brevetées - Choisissez votre propre méthode de stockage des données : stockage local ou synchronisé et sauvegardé sur le Cloud
Vos données ne nous intéressent pas
- Il est primordial pour nous que vous ayez le contrôle de vos données. Telle que nous l'avons conçu, Dashlane ne nous permet pas d'accéder aux informations que vous y enregistrez. • Les autres entreprises ne conservent pas vos données de manière sécurisée car ce n'est pas leur métier. Chez Dashlane, c'est précisément notre cœur de métier. Pour en savoir plus sur Dashlane, consultez notre Politique de confidentialité (https://www.dashlane.com/privacy) et nos Conditions générales de service (https://www.dashlane.com/terms).

is information about what users do outside of the Services (e.g., sites where autofill is used to sign in; what sites or apps a user has credentials for in their Secured Data). Behavioral Data is critical to the Services’ proper operation – Apps must recognize the site a user is logging into to populate the credentials, for example. Certain Behavioral Data is available to authorized administrators of B2B Accounts (each, a “B2B Admin”) on an individual basis to enable Client Admins to improve Client security (e.g., B2B Admins can see whether an individual user has compromised credentials), but is only available to Dashlane on a fully anonymized basis (e.g. Dashlane can see what percentage of all users have credentials for a specific site, but not whether any individual user has credentials for that site).

sind Informationen darüber, was Benutzer außerhalb der Dienste tun (z. B. Websites, auf denen automatisches ausfüllen zur Anmeldung verwendet wird; für welche Websites oder Apps ein Benutzer Anmeldedaten in seinen geschützten Daten hat). Verhaltensdaten sind für den ordnungsgemäßen Betrieb der Dienste entscheidend – beispielsweise müssen Apps die Website erkennen, bei der sich ein Benutzer anmeldet, um Anmeldedaten auszufüllen. Bestimmte Verhaltensdaten sind autorisierten Administratoren von B2B-Konten (jeweils ein „B2B-Administrator“) auf individueller Basis verfügbar, damit Client-Administratoren die Sicherheit von Clients verbessern können (B2B-Admins können sehen, ob Anmeldedaten eines bestimmten Benutzers gefährdet sind). Diese Daten sind Dashlane nur auf vollständig anonymisierter Basis verfügbar (z. B. Dashlane kann sehen, wie viel Prozent aller Benutzer Anmeldedaten für eine bestimmte Website haben, aber nicht, ob einzelne Benutzer Anmeldedaten für diese Website haben).
